abstract.text: Represent a type-checked parameters that encapsulate both tensor and group of tensors.
Apply softmax activation to the given tensor inplace.
Clamp the given tensor between two values.
Reduce along a given dimension.
Chunk the current tensor into multiple ones.
Copy the given tensor to CPU.
Interpolate from this tensor to the other tensor.
This protocol defines a generic constructs such that we can use DynamicGraph.AnyTensorGroup
to represent either a collection of tensors from multiple GPUs or one tensor.
It has a typed version DynamicGraph.TensorGroup to enforce type constraint.

Detach current tensor from the graph. Afterwards, it is always “isConstant” and cannot requiresGrad.
